name: Chocolate Pecan Brownie Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C).
2. In a small saucepan, melt 3/4 cup butter; stir in 1/4 cup cocoa, then water. Bring to a boil; remove from heat.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, brown sugar, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt. Add the cocoa mixture; beat well.
4. Stir in 1/3 cup of the condensed milk, eggs, and vanilla extract. Pour into a greased 15x10-inch (2L) jelly roll pan.
5. Bake for 15 minutes or until the cake springs back when lightly touched.
6. In another small saucepan, melt the remaining 1/4 cup butter; add the remaining 1/4 cup cocoa and the remaining condensed milk. Stir in icing sugar and nuts.
7. Spread on the warm cake. Cool completely.
